message:
test(rchd): expand daemon init coverage (bd-qzbs)

- Add rchd CLI parse tests
- Fix clippy warnings uncovered by -D warnings
- Sync beads state

All: cargo fmt/check, clippy -D warnings, cargo test

files.patch:

 unsafe_code = "forbid"
